event_info: 139.5kph; play and miss! Extra bounce from a short of length outside off; Jacks looks to cut and the ball goes over his blade. Good carry-through to the keeper as well
137.3kph; full delivery swinging in; ends on the pads; Jacks flicks and misses to get hit on the pad
143.3kph; Mukesh Choudhary pulls his length back; Jacks stays leg-side; opens the bat-face and steers it to third man to get off the mark
full delivery that swings away late outside off; Rickelton watchfully defends it into the off-side
141.6kph; short of a good length ball; slanting in towards leg; Rickelton knocks it to mid-on
141.1kph; not that short to be cutting and Rickelton under-edges it towards cover. Tidy opening over from Mukesh - just 1 off it
fullish delivery with a slip in place; Jacks shimmies down; moves leg-side in the process and throws his arms to slap it to extra cover

ball_event: out Caught by Ramakrishna Ghosh!! In the air and taken! Ramakrishna Ghosh makes an impact in the field with a brilliant catch. 134.1kph
event_info: fullish delivery; Jacks steps out of his crease and backs away in the process to swing across the line. The ball moves away a bit off the deck and the ball flies over backward point off the outer part of the bat. Ghosh runs in from deep backward point; dives forward to snaffle it with both hands inches above the turn. Everything was right about that catch. Even after catching; he ensures that the ball doesn't pop out when his elbows hit the ground. CSK get the early breakthrough. Will Jacks c Ramakrishna Ghosh b Anshul Kamboj 1(5)
good length that shapes away a bit; Naman Dhir defends it into the off-side
streaky boundary to get off the mark! Inswinging very full ball; Dhir hurriedly brings his bat down and gets a thick inside edge that runs away to fine leg for four
beaten! Seams back in from a length; Dhir looks to waft it through the off-side with an angled blade and gets beaten on the inside edge

beaten again! 135.4kph; good lift from a short of length; this one holds its line outside off. Dhir swings wildly across the line and the ball goes past his outside edge. Testing over from Anshul Kamboj
139.7kph; another play and miss! Short of length; Rickelton looks to play across the line and misses as the ball sneaks past the inside edge
141.3kph; fuller ball; curls away as well. Rickelton stays leg-side even as he steps out; crouches low and reaches for it as he stylishly carves it over sweeper cover. The timing is exquisite
140.3kph; Mukesh Choudhary pulls his length back; Rickelton sees it coming. Stands tall and waits for the ball to come to him before dispatching it over deep midwicket with a thumping pull shot
139.3kph; pushes this length ball towards cover and Rickelton sets off for a single; gets sent back by Naman Dhir who screams 'no'
141.5kph; width on offer and Rickelton steers it to deep backward point
138.7kph; back of a length; Dhir pulls hard. Hits him high on the bat and the timing is spot on. Ramakrishna Ghosh moves to his left in the deep to cut it off
137kph; on a length and wide of off; Rickelton cuts it to deep backward point

first six for Naman Dhir! 136kph; short of a good length ball on off-middle; Dhir rises as the ball comes to him; clears his front leg and swings through the line to tonk it over wide long-on for an 89m six
138kph; short of length outside off; punched to deep point
136.6kph; beaten! Fuller than a length outside off; may have further moved away after pitching; Rickelton crouches a bit to swing it over midwicket and misses

run-out chance and Rickelton survives! 135.9kph; yorker length; Rickelton looks to squeeze it through the covers. He ends up jamming it into the pitch and Kamboj moves to his right to collect it. The bowler has a shy at the stumps at the keeper's end and misses the target. Rickelton had given up as he was well outside the crease. Luckily for him; there was no direct-hit. Kamboj has his hands on head
short of length outside off; chopped to deep backward point
round the wicket; very full; in the blockhole and that's been jammed back at the bowler
94.3kph; overpitched outside off; Rickelton leans across and drills it straight to mid-off
86kph; slower and on a length; Rickelton gets down on one leg to slogsweep it over long leg for a 76m six. It came right off the meat of the bat
94.7kph; quicker one outside off; Rickelton hurriedly cuts to extra cover
95.6kph; Veer goes fuller and this one is closer to off. Rickelton brings out the slogsweep once again and clears the long-on fielder comfortably. Jamie Overton is a mere spectator

3 sixes = 18 runs off the over! 102.5kph; even quicker and Veer tries to bowl this one wider. Rickelton expects it and shuffles a bit before kneeling down and dispatching it over long-on. Didn't time it as well as the previous one but cleared long-on easily once again
140.5kph; pitched up; Dhir drives to mid-off
138.2kph; leg-lined full delivery and Naman Dhir brings his wrists to whip it away over deep midwicket. Brings up the fifty partnership. That's the 7th six of MI's innings

1 run; 125.5kph; slower ball and Mukesh pulls his length back as well. Dhir is early to clip and misses. The ball rolls to backward point off the pad and the batters scamper across for a quick run via leg-byes
144.4kph; very full and darted in; flicked to deep backward square leg
141.8kph; low full toss; driven straight to mid-off
full on the stumps; Rickelton wristily drives it to long-on
92.3kph; over the wicket; legbreak well outside off; cut to deep backward point
95.2kph; in the air and dropped! Dhir goes on the back foot to cut; extra bounce and the edge goes straight to short third man. A dolly and Shivam Dube makes a mess of it
94.3kph; fullish ball drifting in; reverse-swept straight to backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Urvil Patel!! Noor strikes! The half-century partnership has been broken. 97.2kph
event_info: quick leggie on a length around off. Not much spin and Rickelton gets down low to slogsweep. Hits it flat and straight down deep backward square leg's throat. Ryan Rickelton c Urvil Patel b Noor Ahmad 37(24) [6s-5]

96.9kph; Suryakumar Yadav gets off the mark with a boundary! Googly on a short of length outside off; Suryakumar spots it. Waits on the back foot and late-cuts it past the slip fielder. Runs away to third man for four
94.6kph; another googly; better length and it's just outside off; Suryakumar watchfully defends from the crease
93.2kph; full and darted in; Dhir backs away to drive it to the left of the bowler. Veer sticks his left hand out to stop it
shot! 94.5kph; flat; full and on the stumps; Dhir shimmies down; moves leg-side in the process and stylishly drives inside-out over extra cover. A couple of bounces and into the fence
fullish delivery; knocked into the leg-side and the batters scamper across for a quick single
92.8kph; full delivery; Suryakumar pushes it to extra cover
96.6kph; quick and full; driven along the ground to long-off
96.8kph; Dhir jogs down the track to bunt this non-turning fullish ball to long-on
tumbles after he delivers; but it's a decent delivery. In-slanting length ball on off; Dhir taps it into the off-side for a quick single
133.4kph; hard length; comes in off the deck; Suryakumar stands tall to punch and inside-halves it to mid-on
135.2kph; full and wide of off; Suryakumar throws his arms at it to flay it over backward point. No chance for the man in the deep to cut it off
135.1kph; Ramakrishna Ghosh pulls his length back and targets the stumps. Comes a bit quicker than the batter expects and a hopping Suryakumar defends it back to the bowler
131.3kph; short of length delivery around off; Suryakumar steers it to third man
130.4kph; fuller ball angling in; knocked down to long-on
93.2kph; full on off; Dhir taps it to point and the batters take a quick single
96.1kph; quick; fraction short and wide of off. Suryakumar goes on the back foot and cuts fiercely to the right of the diving backward point fielder. Third boundary for SKY
SKY takes the aerial route now! 92.4kph; googly that's full and outside off; Suryakumar gets down on one leg; swings hard through the line to loft it over straight long-off
96.5kph; quick and flat on leg; Suryakumar bunts it to long-on
97.3kph; wrong 'un outside off; Naman Dhir heaves it straight back at the bowler who does well to stop it in his followthrough
Dhir goes back; makes room in the process and cuts through point. 13 runs off the over
shot! Dhir shimmies down the wicket; gets a short of length delivery and he manages to flay it over extra cover. Not off the middle but with mid-off inside the ring; the ball trickles into the rope
that's off the middle. This shot shows what a good surface this is. Back of a length delivery; not there in the slot but Dhir manages to play it on the rise; stands tall and pumps it wide of mid-off
slower ball around off; Dhir guides it towards backward point and the fielder makes the half stop

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Maiden IPL wicket for Ramakrishna Ghosh. And what a wicket to get! He stands there with his finger pointing upwards. And another start from SKY that's all
event_info: nothing more. Short of length delivery; Suryakumar tries his best to get on top of the bounce and carve it over point; but hits it flat and straight to sweeper cover. Brevis barely had to move as the ball came at a nice height for him. Suryakumar Yadav c Dewald Brevis b Ramakrishna Ghosh 21(12) [4s-3 6s-1]
short of length around off; Tilak gets on top of the bounce and punches wide of cover
good comeback from Ghosh after going for fours off the first two balls. He only concedes 2 more runs and gets the wicket of SKY. Full pitcher close to off; Dhir drives and picks out extra cover

did that carry? Dube is not having a great time in the field. This was a chance and he was late to react. Back of a length delivery; Overton gets it to stop and Tilak checks his back foot punch; chips it towards cover and Dube runs around instead of charging forward - the ball lands just in front of him
too straight - on middle and leg; Tilak tucks it backward of square
fullish delivery around off; Dhir drives through the line and Ruturaj dives full length near mid-off; gets a hand and then chases behind to haul the ball back in; saves a run
146.7ks back of a length angled across; Tilak looks to punch it through the off-side but the extra bounce takes it past the outside-edge
144.6ks leg-lined delivery; Tilak clips it in front of square and scampers back for the second
shuffles across and sits down to play the lap; Overton goes pace off and Tilak gets into a tangle; misses the scoop and is struck on the wrist. Overton checks if he is fine

the change in angle almost worked for Noor. He goes round the wicket and slips in the googly; Dhir does not read it and looks to go down the ground. The ball spins past the outside-edge and Samson is quick to light up the stumps. Dhir was aware and quickly planted his right boot back into the crease
drifting into the right-hander; Dhir works it through mid-wicket
googly that turns in; Tilak gently nudges it to mid-wicket and crosses over

Dube having a horror time in the field. Short of length around off; Dhir slashes and the ball flies off the top-edge towards short third. Dube makes a mess off a easy stop and allows the pair to cross over

ball_event: out Caught by Ruturaj Gaikwad!! Almost a collision between Ruturaj and Urvil
event_info: no harm done and more importantly the catch is taken. This is floated up invitingly by Noor; the conventional leg-break that turns away and Tilak looks to slog sweep against the spin; gets a thick top-edge and the ball skies towards cover. Ruturaj called for it but not sure Urvil heard him; they almost collide but it is Ruturaj who hangs on. Tilak Varma c Ruturaj Gaikwad b Noor Ahmad 5(8)
tossed up around off; Hardik eases it towards sweeper cover
1 run; charges down first ball and Overton sees him coming; bangs it into the surface and gets it to climb sharply; Hardik lets go and Samson fumbles behind the wicket
off-pace delivery; fraction short and Dhir shovels it along the ground to deep square leg

145.5ks good length ball on off; Hardik defends to the right of the bowler and Overton uses his reach; grabs it with one hand and sends a throw to the striker's end. Hardik had to scramble and he gets in awkwardly - falling down; rolling over and somehow not injuring himself
edged and safe. Back of a length delivery; in the channel around off; Hardik is rooted to the crease and defends with soft hands; hence the outside-edge does not carry to Samson - goes on the bounce

uhhh! That's a peach. Seemed like there was a noise. But no appeal from Samson or Overton. Another delivery right in the corridor of uncertainty; it is short of length and Hardik has a tentative poke; the ball fizzes past the outside-edge. UltraEdge shows a flat-line..
slower ball that's fraction short; Hardik makes room and chops it square on the off-side
edged and four! 117.5ks slower ball outside off; Hardik saw the width and threw everything behind the shot; gets a thick outside-edge and the ball flies past a diving Samson
fuller and outside off; Hardik's weight is on the back leg and he still drills the drive to extra cover
136.2ks back of a length delivery; Hardik punches it square and the sweeper tidies up
122ks off-pace delivery; Naman aims to steer it behind square and is beaten by the lack of pace
135.1ks low full toss around off; Dhir jams it to long-on
132.7ks fullish delivery close to off; Hardik eases it to long-off and retains strike
1 run; spinning down leg; Hardik misses the flick and the ball deflects off the pad
93.9ks flatter and drifting across; Dhir tucks it through mid-wicket

wrong 'un outside off; spins away as well; Hardik stays leg-side and attempts a drive through the off-side; beaten on the outside-edge and Samson is quick to whip the bails. There's a stumping check. First they are checking for a caught behind; nothing on UltraEdge. The right leg is firmly planted in the crease. Not Out..
Krunalesque short ball; but does not get that kind of bounce; cramps Hardik for room though and the pull is mistimed to long-on
95.1ks dragged short; Dhir pulls and picks out deep mid-wicket
short of length around off; Hardik rides the bounce and knocks it to extra cover. Noor finishes a fine spell. His figures read - 4-0-26-2. He had a good game in the reverse fixture as well..

140.7ks sharp short ball and Dhir takes it on; but the ball keeps climbing and goes over the top-edge. Samson also fumbles and the pair scamper back for the second. It has been given as runs. So there was a thin top-edge. It will go down as a dropped catch by Samson. Fifty for Dhir.

short of length at the body; Dhir is rushed on the pull and gloves it towards short fine. He started well but his knock has come to a stall; needs a lift in the final four overs to get Mumbai Indians to a competitive total
slower ball and Hardik loses his shape; mistimes the heave to deep mid-wicket

that's more like it. Overton goes pace on and loses his line - too straight - on middle and leg; Dhir maintains a solid base and swings it over backward square leg. Mumbai Indians need plenty more of this..

ball_event: out Caught by (sub)Sarfaraz Khan!! Excellent catch by Sarfaraz and Overton gets rid of the set batter. 123.8ks off-cutter that holds to the surface
event_info: Dhir backs away and is deceived for pace; does not get any timing on the drive and miscues it towards extra cover. Sarfaraz moves to his left; leaps and hangs on with both hands. A good knock from Dhir comes to an end. Naman Dhir c (sub)Sarfaraz Khan b Jamie Overton 57(37) [4s-4 6s-3]
angled across the left-hander; Minz drives and the outside-edge flies down to third man
shot! Full and outside off; right in the slot and Minz does well not to overhit the drive; he bends his back knee and lifts it over extra cover. The timing takes care of the rest

ball_event: out Bowled!! Dragged on! Four and out for Minz. 132.5ks back of a length delivery
event_info: angled across the southpaw; Minz stands tall and tries to force it through the off-side; gets an inside-edge and the ball dislodges the bails. Mumbai Indians' innings coming apart. They are six down and into the bowlers. Only Hardik can save them from a below par total. Robin Minz b Anshul Kamboj 5(3) [4s-1]
130.5ks back of a length around the hips; Bhagat turns it gently to mid-wicket
fullish delivery on off; Bhagat eases it to long-on and gets Hardik on strike
141.5ks low full toss on off; Hardik clears his front leg and digs it out to deep mid-wicket
full and at the stumps; Bhagat pushes it to long-on and retains strike
that's to quick for Bhagat. 149.2ks short of length delivery; Bhagat moves away and is nowhere close to making contact. That ball thudded into Samson's gloves
145.6ks back of a length delivery; Bhagat directs it square of the wicket and brings Hardik on strike
uffff! 147.2ks quick and short; following Hardik and giving him no room; he gets into a tangle and almost gloves it to the off-side. Almost took a blow on the body
now a pacy short ball outside off; keeps bouncing and does not give Hardik a chance to connect with the slash
slower ball outside off; Hardik drives towards extra cover and the fielder makes a diving stop; the duo scamper back for the second
142.4ks back of a length delivery; Hardik tucks it to deep backward square and the ball almost carried to Mukesh. He overruns it but does well to make the stop

Kamboj comes round the wicket - does not quite nail the yorker; 137.7ks full delivery on the pads; Hardik flicks it in front of square; right between deep square leg and deep mid-wicket. Noor gets around and allows the ball to slip past his grasp
sprays the yorker down leg; Hardik does not bother and collects the wide
138ks yorker outside off; Hardik is standing deep in the crease and digs it out to long-off; denies the single

ball_event: out Caught by Dewald Brevis!! Hardik's struggles come to an end. He never got his rhythm or timing. 137.1ks fullish delivery on leg
event_info: Hardik does not quite get under the length as he attempts the straight-batted loft; gets more height than distance and Brevis settles under it near deep mid-wicket. Third wicket for Kamboj and he levels with Bhuvneshwar as the leading wicket-taker. Hardik Pandya c Dewald Brevis b Anshul Kamboj 18(23) [4s-2]

why wasn't he sent above Krish Bhagat? Boult has smoked his first ball over the rope. Kamboj went over the wicket and offered a slot ball; Boult clears his front leg and heaves it into the deep mid-wicket stand
missed out there. Full toss at the stumps; Boult backs away and slashes it towards square third man

1 run; nails the yorker outside off; Bhagat fails to dig it out and Boult races across to the other end. Samson under arms the ball to Kamboj and he has a shy at the non-striker's end; hits Bhagat on the back instead
135.9kph; over the wicket; back of a length; Samson walks forward to tuck it to backward square leg
inswinger; middle-stump line; Gaikwad watchfully defends from the crease
fraction short; Gaikwad looks to force it through the off-side; the ball shapes in though. Off the inner edge and the ball rolls behind square on the leg-side
straight line from Boult; Samson stays in his crease to knock it to mid-on
138.6kph; first boundary for Samson! Boult serves width outside off; quick hands from Samson to scythe it through the gap between backward point and point
128.3kph; short of length; pushed to mid-off for a single

edged and dropped! Jasprit Bumrah turns around and walks back with a smile on his face. Seam-up delivery; good bounce on a length outside off. Samson stays leg-side and tentatively fiddles his bat at it. Guides it straight to first slip off the outside edge. An absolute dolly and Jacks puts it down
in-seamer; Samson pushes from the crease; inside-edges onto his pad and the ball rolls towards point
full and swinging away outside off; Gaikwad throws his arms at it and outside-edges it over and wide of slip. A single to third man
low bounce on this occasion; decks in as well; Samson has a wild waft at it and gets beaten on the inside edge
141kph; Bumrah pulls his length back; there's a bit of width and Samson puts it away. Stands tall on the back foot to punch it behind square on the off-side. Races away to the fence

ball_event: out Caught by Ryan Rickelton!! Bumrah gets his man! 138.7kph
event_info: it's the outswinger outside off; extra bounce from a length outside off. Samson slashes hard for a cut with no feet movement and gets a fat outside edge. Ryan Rickelton; the man with the mitts; leaps to his right to take a two-handed catch. No heroics from Samson tonight. Jacks will be a relieved man. Bumrah strikes in his first over. Sanju Samson c Ryan Rickelton b Jasprit Bumrah 11(9) [4s-2]

135.4kph; that's a glorious stroke from the CSK captain! Pitched up by Boult; Gaikwad presses forward and shows the maker's name to push-drive it between the bowler and the non-striker. Beautifully timed
137.3kph; shortened length; the line is a bit too straight; Gaikwad works it behind square on the on-side for a couple more
135.1kph; this isn't short enough to be cutting and Gaikwad under-edges it towards cover-point
138.7kph; banged in short by Boult and that's way over the ducking batter. Wided for height
137.7kph; short of length; Gaikwad stands tall and watchfully knocks it to mid-on

139.7kph; in the air; safe and four! No half measures from Gaikwad. Short ball that's below shoulder-high. Gaikwad spots the length early and slams the pull in front of square on the leg-side. Deep backward square leg runs to his left but to no avail. A couple of bounces into the fence

beautifully timed! 134.4kph; Boult's line too straight on this occasion and Gaikwad nonchalantly flicks it over deep backward square leg. Doesn't bother to keep it down and off she goes. 17 runs off the over
140.6kph; leg-lined length ball; Urvil closes the bat-face to glance it through square leg and gets off the mark
137.4kph; short of length delivery on the stumps; Urvil watchfully defends from the crease
138.7kph; shortish ball down leg; Urvil walks across to get inside the line and try to hook it away. Off the batter's glove and the ball runs away to fine leg for four runs
in-seamer; Urvil shapes to heave across the line and misses this short of length ball to get hit on the hip
another play and miss! 140.7kph; fuller than a good length; Urvil swings wildly across the line and gets beaten on the outside edge. Bounces over the off-stump
pad-lined ball to end the over and Urvil helps it on its way to fine leg
top-edge and six! 131.4kph; in-slanbting short of length delivery; Urvil looks to swing it over backward square leg. Fat edge and the ball flies over fine leg for an 84m six
133.9kph; goes over mid-on now! Short of a good length; Urvil stands tall and swings hard to thump it over mid-on. Not quite off the middle of the bat but he's muscled it
107.4kph; off-speed full delivery and Urvil knocks it to long-on
132kph; short of length on off; Gaikwad plays with soft hands to tap it to point
107.3kph; pace off; looked like the leg-cutter; Urvil waits to heave and finds midwicket

134.6kph; wow! The batter backs away and Bhagat follows him with a full delivery. Urvil brings his wrists into play to powerfully flick it over square leg. Superb contact and it's six more for Urvil. 18 runs off the over
90.6kph; length ball on off; pushed to the left of cover where Hardik makes a diving stop
101.5kph; quick but it's a drag down from Ghazanfar. Gaikwad sees that; kneels down and swat-pulls it over deep backward square leg. Hardik watches the proceedings in disbelief
90.6kph; fuller ball and Gaikwad knocks it to long-on

carrom ball; fullish outside off; Urvil Patel gets down on one leg to slog it across the line and ends up dragging it onto his stumps off the toe-end of the bat. End of Urvil's cameo. MI badly needed that breakthrough and Ghazanfar strikes in his opening over. Urvil Patel b AM Ghazanfar 24(12) [4s-2 6s-2]
short of length; Kartik goes on the back foot to knock it to mid-on
the length is once again on the shorter side and Kartik cuts to point
starts with a shortish leggie that keeps a shade low; Gaikwad cuts to deep point
87.3kph; skids off the deck on a good length; Kartik pushes it to cover off the back foot
88.7kph; Kartik shimmies down the track; converts it into a half-volley and smashes it over the non-striker's head for a one-bounce four. Opens his account in style
legbreak; Kartik pushes to cover
89.3kph; shortened length; cut to deep point
this one slides on and cramps the batter for room. Kartik hangs back to blunt it into the leg-side and Raghu is quick to get to the ball
99.3kph; short ball; spinning in; pulled away to deep midwicket
91.2kph; fullish ball on the stumps; Kartik gets forward and nudges it into the mid-on region for a single
94.4kph; low full toss on the pads; nudged to square leg and the batters take two
90.3kph; pad-lined; worked into the midwicket pocket
skips down the pitch and defensively pushes to the left of the bowler. Ghazanfar makes a good stop in his followthrough

89.3kph; Kartik clears deep midwicket. Half-tracker from Ghazanfar and Kartik goes on the back foot to powerfully heave it over deep midwicket for a 77m six. Will Jacks; a few yards in front of the boundary rope; jumps to try and take a one-handed catch but the ball goes over his hand. It would have been catchable had he stayed back
90.8kph; legbreak that spins a bit; Gaikwad dinks it towards mid-off from the crease

86.6kph; fraction short; Gaikwad jabs it between long-on and deep midwicket. Tilak runs to his left and tries to flick it towards the converging long-on fielder (Dhir). Not a clean tag-team effort and it's an easy two for the CSK captain
the length is once again on the shorter side and Gaikwad pulls to deep midwicket
89.8kph; full leggie; Kartik pushes it back to the bowler
90.1kph; quicker one that slides on; Kartik goes on the back foot to bunt it to long-on
92.5kph; eases this length ball to long-off for a single
120.2kph; off-speed short of length delivery; Gaikwad closes the bat-face early; gets a leading edge towards cover-point
slower ball into the deck; Kartik waits on the back foot and cuts over point for a single
121.7kph; slow bouncer but it's way over the batter's head. Nothing doing from the batter
124.5kph; opens the bat-face to punch this length ball to deep point
128kph; back of a length; pulled to deep midwicket
118.4kph; short of length; Gaikwad allows the ball to come to him and punches to long-on
125.8kph; short ball; leg-lined; pulled along the ground to deep backward square leg
91.2ks fraction short on off; Kartik chops it towards cover-point
85.9ks tossed up around off; Kartik eases it towards cover
92.6ks flatter and touch quicker; Kartik knocks it to cover and quickly crosses over
88.9ks shortens the length; Gaikwad flicks it through mid-wicket
90.5ks flighted delivery and Kartik winds for the big mow; moves away and drags it to long-on
drifting into leg; Gaikwad leans forward and works it into the vast open spaces on the leg-side; easy two
that breaks the shackles. Couple of quiet overs and something had to give. 133.2ks length delivery; right in the slot and Kartik swings hard; gets enough for the ball to sail over the long-on fielder
back of a length outside off; Kartik steers it on the bounce to third man
128.4ks on a length and outside off; Gaikwad pats it to point and crosses over
116.9ks short and banged into the wicket; Kartik hops and toe-ends the upper cut to third man
124.7ks back of a length close to off; Gaikwad knocks it to long-on
119.9ks off-pace short ball outside off; Kartik is through the upper cut early and misses it completely
89.7ks tossed up; Gaikwad nudges it to mid-wicket and calls for two. Kartik had to hurry as the throw came to his end. It is not on target and Kartik survives
89.3ks flighted delivery; Gaikwad defends to the vacant cover region
90.3ks touch quicker; Kartik shimmies out and does not get to the pitch; settles with a push to long-on
drifting into leg; Gaikwad leans forward and nurdles it round the corner - square leg
92.5ks flatter and fraction short; Kartik punches to long-off

92.1ks tad short and around off; Gaikwad chops it square of the wicket and retains strike. Economical spell from Raghu Sharma on debut. But he and Mumbai Indians would have loved a wicket. His figures - 4-0-24-0

back to back fifties for Gaikwad. He is slowly getting back to his best. Has looked more fluent in this knock than he did in the previous one. 100.3ks quicker and fuller; Gaikwad angles it with an open bat face towards point and crosses over. He is anchoring this chase beautifully
very full delivery on off; Kartik squeezes the drive towards sweeper cover
slower and bit of inward turn; Gaikwad works it to mid-wicket
attacks the stumps; Gaikwad makes a bit of room and eases it square on the off-side
steps out and plays it with soft hands in front of cover. Gaikwad responds to the quick single
shot! Overpitched and that ruins the over for Ghazanfar. Gaikwad was not going to miss out; fast hands by him and he creams the drive wide of cover. It was in the air but well wide of Hardik
138.2ks back of a length delivery; Kartik drops it with soft hands in front of mid-wicket and crosses over

shot! 137.9ks short of length delivery and Gaikwad is quick to pounce; he picked the length early and transferred his weight back; pulled it in front of square and there's no one at deep mid-wicket. They need less than a run-a-ball now
sharp bouncer; well-directed as well; Gaikwad ducks and sways out of the line
120.8ks short of length delivery; Gaikwad rides the bounce and directs it towards point

another bouncer; angled in and Gaikwad sinks down. Allows it to sail over him. Umpire signals two for over and Gaikwad reviews the onfield call. He reckons that is a wide. Let's see.. It is high. But how high? It is a wide for height.. Successful review from CSK
full and slanting in; Gaikwad shimmies out and pushes it firmly to cover. There's a direct hit at the non-striker's end but Kartik had got back in comfortably
another direct-hit but once again the batter is in. Gaikwad pushes it to mid-off and sets off straightaway. Hardik swoops down and hits the target at the non-striker's end. But Gaikwad was in..
low full toss outside off; Gaikwad toe-ends the drive towards mid-off
130.3ks low full toss at the stumps; Kartik digs it out to mid-off
108.3ks slower bouncer outside off; Gaikwad watches it sail over him. Called wide for height
lovely shot! Gaikwad shimmies down; stays leg-side and converts it into a ful pitcher; drives straight of mid-off and the ball races away. That's the best shot he's played in this knock..
once again charges down and gets there on the full; cue-ends the drive to mid-off
131.6ks full toss outside off; Kartik drives to deep extra cover
105.4ks slower short ball; Gaikwad almost jumps off the ground as he attempts the pull; he's deceived for pace and fails to connect; the ball goes on the bounce to Rickelton

smashed! 94.8ks dragdown outside off; ample width for Kartik to capitalise; he goes on the back foot and slaps it in front of square. Tilak gets around and dives from long-off but had no chance to stop that
drifting in with the arm; Kartik defends to the right of Ghazanfar

fabulous shot! It is not easy to use your feet against Ghazanfar as he does not give much flight. But Kartik runs down the wicket; converts it into a full delivery and whips it with a strong bottom hand over deep mid-wicket. They are couple of hits away..
carrom ball that's slowed up; Kartik misses the dab and is beaten on the under-edge
hammered! Tilak does not even bother this time. Overpitched outside off; Kartik generates incredible power on the drive and gives long-off no chance
attacks the stumps; Kartik prods forward and defends to mid-wicket
fullish delivery around off; Gaikwad chips it down the ground and is content with a single
slower ball around off; Kartik swings across the line and misses. He's on 47..
another off-pace delivery; Kartik does not pick it and is early into the heave; misses and it is another dot
full pitcher outside off; Kartik drills it back past Gaikwad and Tilak gets around from long-on; dives and stops the boundary

maiden IPL fifty. This has been a fine knock. He has played the perfect second fiddle to his captain. Raises his bat and soaks in the applause of the home crowd. Short of length delivery; Kartik gets on top of the bounce and pulls backward of square leg
shimmies down and yorks himself; jams it off the toe-end back to Bhagat

CSK win by 8 wickets. Kartik is delighted as he walks across and is embraced by Gaikwad. This is another comprehensive win for CSK over MI this season. Full and angled outside off; Kartik shapes to scoop but since the line was outside off; he adjusted and reverse lapped it over short third. That was an incredible shot..
